prompt: Create a highly detailed fantasy trading card game card in a polished premium TCG style, full-frame vertical layout with ornate gilded borders, engraved filigree corners, and a dark navy, black, ivory, and radiant gold color palette. The card title at the top reads {argument name="character name" default="SIR ALARIC DAWNBLADE"} in large serif capitals, with the subtitle {argument name="class title" default="PALADIN OF THE LIGHT"} beneath it. The main illustration shows a heroic male paladin standing in a luminous cathedral filled with tall glowing stained-glass windows, drifting golden sparks, and sacred light rays. He has long wavy blond hair, wears elaborate gold-and-steel plate armor with blue cloth accents and a flowing deep blue cloak, holds a glowing longsword upright in one hand, and carries a massive ornate shield in the other, emblazoned with a radiant sun-cross emblem. His pose is noble, powerful, and defensive, centered as the card’s focal figure. Add exactly 4 stat icons stacked vertically along the left side in circular medallions with numbers: crossed swords with 3, shield with 3, heart with 4, and boot with 2. Include a sun emblem medallion in the upper left corner and a vertical banner crest in the upper right with a gold sword-and-cross symbol. The lower third contains a parchment-like rules text box with exactly 3 named abilities, each with a small icon and bold serif name followed by rules text: {argument name="ability one" default="DIVINE SMITE"}, {argument name="ability two" default="AURA OF PROTECTION"}, and {argument name="ability three" default="LAY ON HANDS"}. Beneath the abilities, add an italic flavor quote centered on the parchment: {argument name="flavor quote" default="By the Light, I stand. By the Light, I strike. By the Light, I shall not fall."} At the very bottom, place the type line in serif capitals reading {argument name="creature line" default="ALLY ♦ HUMAN ♦ PALADIN"}. Add a large blue-and-gold gem-framed mana or cost badge with the number 4 in the lower left corner, and a circular faction badge with a white sword or holy symbol in the lower right corner. The overall look should feel like an official premium fantasy card game, cinematic, readable, richly illuminated, intricately textured, and collector-grade.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张细节极其丰富的奇幻集换式卡牌，采用精致的高级 TCG 风格，全幅垂直布局，配有华丽的镀金边框、雕花边角，以及深海军蓝、黑色、象牙白和璀璨金的配色方案。卡牌顶部的标题为 {argument name="character name" default="SIR ALARIC DAWNBLADE"}，采用大号衬线体大写字母，下方副标题为 {argument name="class title" default="PALADIN OF THE LIGHT"}。主插画展示了一位英勇的男性圣骑士，站在充满高大发光彩色玻璃窗、漂浮金色火花和神圣光束的宏伟教堂中。他留着金色长卷发，身穿精致的钢金板甲，配有蓝色布料装饰和飘逸的深蓝色斗篷，一手垂直握着发光的长剑，另一手拿着巨大的华丽盾牌，盾牌上绘有光芒四射的太阳十字徽章。他的姿态高贵、强健且具有防御性，作为卡牌的视觉中心。在左侧垂直排列 4 个圆形勋章样式的属性图标，并标有数字：交叉剑（3）、盾牌（3）、爱心（4）和靴子（2）。左上角包含一个太阳徽章，右上角有一个垂直的旗帜纹章，带有金色剑与十字符号。下三分之一处包含一个羊皮纸风格的规则文本框，列出 3 个具名技能，每个技能配有一个小图标和加粗的衬线体名称，后跟规则文本：{argument name="ability one" default="DIVINE SMITE"}、{argument name="ability two" default="AURA OF PROTECTION"} 和 {argument name="ability three" default="LAY ON HANDS"}。在技能下方，羊皮纸中心添加一行斜体背景语：{argument name="flavor quote" default="By the Light, I stand. By the Light, I strike. By the Light, I shall not fall."}。在最底部，放置一行衬线体大写字母的类型说明：{argument name="creature line" default="ALLY ♦ HUMAN ♦ PALADIN"}。左下角添加一个带有数字 4 的大型蓝金宝石边框法力或费用徽章，右下角添加一个带有白色剑或圣徽的圆形阵营徽章。整体外观应呈现出官方高级奇幻卡牌游戏的质感，具有电影感、易读性、丰富的照明效果、复杂的纹理以及收藏级品质。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奇幻圣骑士集换式卡牌：一张优质的奇幻 TCG 角色卡，包含光芒四射的重甲圣骑士、华丽的属性与图标，以及清晰易读的卡牌游戏布局，适用于定制卡牌设计样机。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
